title: View post analytics for your content
author: LinkedIn

title: Content analytics for your LinkedIn Page
author: LinkedIn
notes: Current LinkedIn Page content analytics documentation. Supports Page-level metrics context.

title: How to Measure the Success of Your Employee Advocacy Program
author: LinkedIn
notes: Older but first-party LinkedIn guidance. Used only for measurement category precedent: content engagement, employee activation, and business outcomes.

title: The Official Guide to Employee Advocacy
author: LinkedIn
notes: Older official guide. Reviewed for the instruction to measure results and look beyond engagement, but not used for current product mechanics.

title: URL builders: Collect campaign data with custom URLs

notes: Supports UTM parameter advice and consistent naming.

title: Performance report (Search results): Overview and basic setup
author: Google

author: Gartner

title: AI Search & LinkedIn: 5 Takeaways from 9.5 Million Citations

notes: Supports AI visibility context for LinkedIn and individual member profiles.

title: AI Search Visibility Report - May 2026: The Rise of Authority Sources
author: Nathaniel Pallen

title: Sell In Public editorial POV on employee-generated content measurement
